packs.label: Pixflow Design Core Pack
packs.description: Pixflow Design prompt composer sources, discovery, directions, critique, linting, craft refs, prompt templates, and supporting assets.

packs.label: Pixflow Design Skills Pack
packs.description: Pixflow Design skills, including the complete functional skill catalogue.

packs.label: Pixflow Design Templates Pack
packs.description: Pixflow Design non-slide templates with side files, assets, references, and examples.

packs.label: Pixflow Design Systems Pack
packs.description: Pixflow Design systems, including DESIGN.md, optional tokens.css, components.html, and support files.

packs.label: Bento Recipe Pack
packs.description: A Pixflow-owned recipe for modular product pages built from weighted bento cards, soft surfaces, clear hierarchy, and useful proof tiles.

packs.label: Clean Recipe Pack
packs.description: A Pixflow-owned recipe for premium light product, SaaS, plugin, app, and workflow landing pages with centered clarity, inspectable product proof, calm card systems, and restrained conversion rhythm.

packs.label: Energetic Recipe Pack
packs.description: A Pixflow-owned recipe for bold, high-contrast expressive pages with vibrant orange/purple accents, thick 4px borders, hard drop shadows, and modern geometric styling.

packs.label: Enterprise Recipe Pack
packs.description: A Pixflow-owned recipe for high-contrast enterprise workflow pages with dark-green control surfaces, orange action accents, structured product panels, automation diagrams, and purposeful entrance motion.

packs.label: Luxury Recipe Pack
packs.description: A Pixflow-owned recipe for premium dark luxury pages with disciplined monochrome surfaces, oversized uppercase type, editorial product imagery, and restrained conversion moments.

packs.label: Neobrutalism Recipe Pack
packs.description: A Pixflow-owned recipe for bold, high-contrast pages with thick black borders, hard offset shadows, vivid yellow/violet accents, flat surfaces, and disciplined raw energy.

packs.label: Neumorphism Recipe Pack
packs.description: A Pixflow-owned recipe for tactile product dashboards and app pages built from one material surface, raised/inset shadows, teal accents, and clear interaction states.

packs.label: Paper Recipe Pack
packs.description: A Pixflow-owned recipe for light document-workspace, knowledge-base, editor, collaboration, and connected-canvas pages with tactile paper surfaces and product-readable UI proof.

packs.label: 3D Creator Portfolio Recipe Pack
packs.description: Dark, premium 3D-creator portfolio landing page: a full-viewport hero with gradient-text headline and a mouse-following magnetic 3D portrait, a scroll-driven horizontal image marquee, an About section with corner 3D decorations and character-by-character scroll-reveal text, a white Services list, and sticky-stacking project cards.

packs.label: Acreage Farming Recipe Pack
packs.description: Premium precision-farming landing page: dark/light alternating sections, a fullscreen hero video background, an animated stats grid, an infinite logo marquee, and image-backed service cards.

packs.label: AeroCore Aerospace Recipe Pack
packs.description: Premium scroll-cinematic aerospace propulsion marketing site: a blue-to-warm-white gradient hero with parallax wordmark and engine still, a mission thumbnail that grows into a fullscreen sticky video, a pinned tabbed showcase, a bento capabilities grid with looping video cards and a tool marquee, an animated dark stats chart, a horizontal video-story rail, and a starfield footer.

packs.label: AI Designer Portfolio Recipe Pack
packs.description: Premium white-background creative-studio landing page: serif-accented hero, infinite GIF marquee, parallax testimonial, two-card pricing, auto-scrolling testimonial carousel, vertical project showcase, a mouse-trail partner CTA, and a fixed floating bottom nav.

packs.label: Cinematic Landing Page Recipe Pack
packs.description: Premium GSAP-driven cinematic B2B landing page: a scroll-driven full-screen video-slider hero with clip-path ellipse transitions, SplitText char-reveal headlines, a masonry product gallery, scroll-reveal about text, a partner marquee, Lottie feature cards, and a multi-office footer.

packs.label: CodeNest Coding Platform Recipe Pack
packs.description: High-end dark cinematic hero for a coding-education platform: full-screen HLS background video, a liquid-glass card, green-accent uppercase typography, central glow, desktop grid lines, and a working mobile hamburger menu.

packs.label: Dashboard UI Glass Recipe Pack
packs.description: Premium liquid-glassmorphism conference dashboard: dual fullscreen background videos swapped by theme, a 4x2 glass/solid card grid, animated voice-wave participant indicators, and a floating control bar.

packs.label: Dreamcore Landing Recipe Pack
packs.description: Immersive single-page parallax landing: a sticky viewport zooms a portal image toward you on scroll, curtains sweep open on entrance, and a curved arc card slider reveals nine dream-world destinations in scene two.

packs.label: Evergreen Finance Recipe Pack
packs.description: Premium Kova fintech landing: full-screen hero with a forward/reverse boomerang video background, FadeUp blur reveals, floating dashboard cards (savings line + spend bar charts), a split testimonial with a square autoplay video, and a 4-up features grid with image cards and a donut spend chart.

packs.label: Innovation Editorial Recipe Pack
packs.description: Premium dark editorial agency landing page: an Instrument-Serif hero headline over a self-crossfading fullscreen hero video, liquid-glass nav and buttons, and scroll-revealed About / Featured-Video / Philosophy / Services sections.

packs.label: Layered Depth Recipe Pack
packs.description: Cinematic layered-parallax landing page for an architecture studio: fullscreen background video, a giant center brand wordmark behind a parallax sculpture slab, an animated bird-video state machine, frosted-glass nav pills and info panels, and a second full-viewport video section with a centered editorial headline.

packs.label: Liquid Glass Agency Recipe Pack
packs.description: Dark, luxury single-page landing for an AI web-design agency: cinematic video backgrounds, Instrument Serif italic headings, liquid-glass cards and CTAs, BlurText word-by-word reveals, and section-by-section storytelling.

packs.label: Luxury Botanical Recipe Pack
packs.description: Cinematic luxury-fragrance landing page: a fullscreen video hero, a scroll-driven elliptical clip-path reveal, an orbiting carousel of perfume bottles that scales up at a focal point, a newsletter section, and a warm parchment footer.

packs.label: Mindloop Landing Recipe Pack
packs.description: Pure-black monochrome newsletter/content-platform landing page: fullscreen video hero, Instrument-Serif italic accent words, liquid-glass controls, scroll-driven word-by-word mission reveal, and an HLS-video CTA.

packs.label: Mythic Naturecore Recipe Pack
packs.description: A cinematic mythic-naturecore landing page: a 480vh scroll zooms through a portal while mirrored curtains part over a layered world background, with mouse-parallax 3D depth and a Viaoda-Libre / Imprima serif-sans pairing.

packs.label: Nimbus Grid Recipe Pack
packs.description: Dark warm-gold single-page marketing site for a secure cloud-storage product: a shader hero with live console + typewriter, a scroll-driven sticky platform accordion, a scroll-morphing pricing bar field, security cards, a 3D tilting console showcase, and a click-to-explode operations cube.

packs.label: Orbis NFT Recipe Pack
packs.description: Dark space-themed NFT collection landing page with full-bleed CloudFront video backgrounds, a liquid-glass UI, Anton + Condiment fonts, and a neon-green accent across four sections.

packs.label: Portfolio Cosmic Recipe Pack
packs.description: Premium dark single-page portfolio landing: cinematic HLS hero video, Instrument-Serif italic display type, a 000→100 loading counter, an alternating bento works grid, a scroll-pinned parallax exploration gallery, and a marquee contact footer with the locked #89AACC→#4E85BF accent gradient.

packs.label: Pixflow Design Landing Recipe Pack
packs.description: Produce a world-class single-page editorial landing site in the Atelier Zero visual language (Monocle / Apartamento / Études editorial collage) — the same aesthetic Pixflow Design uses for its own marketing surface. The agent fills a typed `inputs.json` from a brand brief, optionally generates 16 collage assets via gpt-image-2, then runs a pure-function composer that emits a self-contained HTML file; a separate path can mirror the Astro marketing site in `apps/landing-page/`. Drop-in scroll-reveal motion and a Headroom-style sticky nav are wired automatically.

packs.label: SkyElite Private Jets Recipe Pack
packs.description: Premium private-jet landing hero: a fullscreen autoplay CloudFront video background, a max-w-7xl nav with a Lucide hamburger mobile dropdown, and a centered overlapping two-line headline (Premium. / Accessible.) with Discover + Book Now pill CTAs.

packs.label: Stellar Launch Recipe Pack
packs.description: Premium awards / venture-prize landing page: an inset white card shell with rounded corners, a fullscreen video hero with chamfered clip-path CTA, a three-column submissions section with angular nomination cards around a square video, and an about-the-founders stats grid using plus-darker image cards and gradient-text figures.

packs.label: Velar Luxury Real Estate Recipe Pack
packs.description: Cinematic single-page luxury real-estate landing page: a typewriter preloader that lifts away, a scroll-driven building image that rises from below and scales up while pinning to a dark statement section, a sticky dark stats band with count-up numbers, and a hover-expand video gallery that slides up over the dark section.

packs.label: Kanban Board Recipe Pack
packs.description:
Kanban / task board with columns (To do / In progress / In review / Done),
draggable-looking cards, assignee avatars, swimlanes, and a top filter
bar. Use when the brief mentions "kanban", "task board", "sprint board",
"trello", "看板".

packs.label: Social Carousel Recipe Pack
packs.description:
A three-card social-media carousel laid out as 1080×1080 squares —
three cinematic, on-brand panels with display headlines that connect
across the series ("onwards." → "to the next one." → "looking ahead.").
Each card has a brand mark, a number / total, a caption, and a "loop"
affordance. Use when the brief asks for a "carousel post", "social
carousel", "Instagram carousel", "LinkedIn series", "X thread cards",
or "三连发".

packs.label: Blog Post Recipe Pack
packs.description:
A long-form article / blog post — masthead, hero image placeholder,
article body with figures and pull quotes, author byline, related posts.
Use when the brief asks for "blog", "article", "post", "essay", or
"case study".

packs.label: Doc Kami Parchment Recipe Pack
packs.description: Warm parchment canvas (#f5f4ed), monochrome ink-blue accent (#1B365D), one serif family, and editorial-grade typography.

packs.label: Magazine Poster Recipe Pack
packs.description:
An editorial-style poster — newsprint paper, dateline, oversized serif
headline with a struck-through word and italic accent, a 2-column body
block, and 6 numbered sections with annotated pull-quote captions.
Reads like a Sunday-paper full-page essay or a thoughtful launch poster.
Use when the brief asks for "magazine poster", "editorial poster",
"newsprint", "essay layout", or "manifesto".

packs.label: Meeting Notes Recipe Pack
packs.description:
Meeting notes page — title bar with attendees, agenda checklist, decisions
block, action items table with owners + dates, and a "next meeting" footer.
Use when the brief mentions "meeting notes", "minutes", "1:1 notes",
"all-hands recap", or "会议纪要".

packs.label: Motion Frames Recipe Pack
packs.description:
A single-frame motion-design composition with looping CSS animations —
rotating type ring, animated globe, ticking timer, parallax labels.
Renders as a hero video poster you can hand straight to HyperFrames or
any keyframe-based exporter. Use when the brief asks for "motion design",
"animated hero", "loop", "video poster", "title card", or pairs Open
Claude Design with HyperFrames for a kinetic export.

packs.label: Orbit General Recipe Pack
packs.description:
Open Orbit briefing skill — selected by the Orbit pipeline when the
user has two or more connectors connected. Pulls the past 24 hours of
activity from every authenticated connector (GitHub, Linear, Notion,
Slack, 飞书, Calendar, Gmail, Drive, Sentry, Vercel, …) and renders a
single adaptive bento-grid dashboard at the top of "我的设计". Each
connector module picks its own UI form (list, avatar stack, status
ring, heatmap, file grid, alert card, …) based on the data shape it
returns, so the layout scales as Orbit's connector ecosystem grows.
This skill should not be triggered manually — it is invoked by
Orbit's daily-digest scheduler against the user's live connector
data.

packs.label: Orbit Gmail Recipe Pack
packs.description:
Open Orbit briefing skill — selected by the Orbit pipeline when
Gmail is the user's only connected connector, or when the user
explicitly scopes their daily digest to Gmail. Pulls the past 24
hours of inbox activity (replies awaited, mentions, cc, auto-
categorized bulk) from the user's authenticated Gmail connection
and renders the digest as the Orbit Daily Digest email opened
inside Gmail's reading view. This skill should not be triggered
manually — it is invoked by Orbit's daily-digest scheduler against
live Gmail data.

packs.label: Orbit Notion Recipe Pack
packs.description:
Open Orbit briefing skill — selected by the Orbit pipeline when
Notion is the user's only connected connector, or when the user
explicitly scopes their daily digest to Notion. Pulls the past 24
hours of document edits, comments, mentions, and database row changes
from the user's authenticated Notion connection and renders the
digest as a native Notion page (callout / toggle / database table
primitives). This skill should not be triggered manually — it is
invoked by Orbit's daily-digest scheduler against live Notion data.

packs.label: Sprite Animation Recipe Pack
packs.description:
A pixel / sprite-style animated explainer slide — full-bleed cream stage,
bold display year, animated pixel-art mascot (e.g. Hanafuda card, mushroom,
or 8-bit console), kinetic Japanese display type, ticking timeline ribbon.
Reads like a single frame of an educational motion video — looping CSS
keyframes, no JS, ready to be screen-recorded into a vertical video.
Use when the brief asks for a "sprite animation", "pixel-art video",
"8-bit explainer", "history of X explainer", "kinetic typography history",
"Nintendo-style", "精灵图动画", "像素动画", or "复古动画".

packs.label: Team OKRs Recipe Pack
packs.description:
OKR tracker page — quarter banner, three objectives with their key
results as progress bars, owner avatars, status pills, and a "this
quarter at a glance" sidebar. Use when the brief mentions "OKRs",
"key results", "objectives", or "目标".

packs.label: Dashboard Recipe Pack
packs.description:
Admin / analytics dashboard in a single HTML file. Fixed left sidebar,
top bar with user/search, main grid of KPI cards and one or two charts.
Use when the brief asks for a "dashboard", "admin", "analytics", or
"control panel" screen.

packs.label: FlowAI Live Dashboard Template Recipe Pack
packs.description:
Team-management dashboard skill in the FlowAI aesthetic — three tabs
(Team Members, Team Details, Activity Log), KPI stat row, member table,
role distribution bar chart, online presence and activity sparklines,
and a top-contributors panel, all in a single self-contained HTML file
with light/dark theming, hoverable chart tooltips, click-to-zoom panels,
and CSV export. Use when the brief asks for a team / workspace admin
dashboard, an interactive admin dashboard with charts, or names FlowAI.

packs.label: GitHub Dashboard Recipe Pack
packs.description:
GitHub repository analytics dashboard — stars, forks, contributors,
issues, pull requests, recent activity, and top contributors. Use when
the brief asks for a GitHub repo dashboard, open-source growth report,
repository health page, or GitHub analytics view.

packs.label: Live Artifact Recipe Pack
packs.description:
Create refreshable, auditable Pixflow Design artifacts backed by connector or local data.
Trigger when the user asks for live dashboards, refreshable reports, synced views, or reusable data-backed artifacts.

packs.label: Live Dashboard Recipe Pack
packs.description:
Notion-style team dashboard rendered as a Live Artifact. A single-page,
self-contained HTML dashboard with KPIs, a 7-day sparkline, a real-time
activity feed and a linked-database task table — wired to Notion via the
Composio connector catalog. Refreshes on demand and when the artifact
is opened. Falls back to seeded mock data when no connector is bound,
so it works offline / in screenshots / in the picker preview.

packs.label: Social Media Dashboard Recipe Pack
packs.description:
Creator-facing social media analytics dashboard in a single HTML file.
A platform switcher (X / LinkedIn / YouTube / Instagram), a row of KPI
cards (followers, engagement rate, likes, reposts), a follower-growth
chart, a "top post this week" preview, and a trending topics / top
comments side panel. Use when the brief mentions a "social media
dashboard", "creator analytics", "social analytics", or names specific
platforms (X, Twitter, LinkedIn, YouTube, Instagram, TikTok) together
with metrics like followers, engagement, likes, reposts.

packs.label: Digital Eguide Recipe Pack
packs.description:
A two-spread digital e-guide preview — page 1 is a cover (display title,
author, "What's inside" stats, table of contents teaser); page 2 is a
spread (lesson body with pull-quote and a step list). Lifestyle / creator
brand tone. Use when the brief asks for an "e-guide", "digital guide",
"lookbook", "lead magnet", "creator guide", "playbook", "PDF guide",
or "电子指南".

packs.label: Email Marketing Recipe Pack
packs.description:
A brand product-launch email — masthead with wordmark, hero image block,
headline lockup with skewed-italic accent, body copy, primary CTA, and a
specifications grid. Pure HTML email layout (centered single column, table
fallback). Use when the brief asks for an "email", "newsletter blast",
"MJML", "product launch email", or "email template".

packs.label: Pricing Page Recipe Pack
packs.description:
A standalone pricing page — header, plan tiers, feature comparison table,
and an FAQ. Use when the brief asks for "pricing", "plans",
"subscription tiers", or a "compare plans" page.

packs.label: SaaS Landing Recipe Pack
packs.description:
Single-page SaaS landing with hero, features, social proof, pricing, and CTA.
Respects the active DESIGN.md color/typography/layout tokens.
Trigger keywords: "saas landing", "marketing page", "product landing".

packs.label: Web Prototype Recipe Pack
packs.description:
General-purpose desktop web prototype. Single self-contained HTML file built
by copying the seed `assets/template.html` and pasting section layouts from
`references/layouts.md`. Default for any landing / marketing / docs / SaaS
page when no more specific skill matches.

packs.label: Critique Recipe Pack
packs.description:
Run a 5-dimension expert design review on any HTML artifact in the
project — Philosophy / Visual hierarchy / Detail / Functionality /
Innovation, each scored 0–10. Outputs a single self-contained HTML
report with a radar chart, evidence-backed scores, and three lists:
Keep / Fix / Quick-wins. Use when the brief asks for a "design
review", "design critique", "5 维度评审", "design audit", or "what's
wrong with my design".

packs.label: Last 30 Days Recipe Pack
packs.description:
Recent community and social trend research over the last 30 days. Use when
the brief asks what people are saying now, recent sentiment, community
reactions, social proof, launch reaction, trend scan, or last-30-days context.

packs.label: Web Prototype Taste Brutalist Recipe Pack
packs.description: Swiss industrial-print web prototype. Newsprint canvas, monolithic black grotesque, viewport-bleeding numerals, hairline grid dividers, hazard-red accent, ASCII syntax decoration. Distilled from Leonxlnx/taste-skill `brutalist-skill` (Swiss Industrial Print mode).

packs.label: Web Prototype Taste Editorial Recipe Pack
packs.description: Editorial-minimalist web prototype. Warm monochrome canvas, serif display + grotesque body, 1px hairline borders, muted pastel chips, generous macro-whitespace, ambient micro-motion. Distilled from Leonxlnx/taste-skill `minimalist-skill`.

packs.label: Web Prototype Taste Soft Recipe Pack
packs.description: Apple-tier soft web prototype. Silver/cream canvas, double-bezel cards, button-in-button CTAs, generous squircle radii, spring motion, ambient mesh. Distilled from Leonxlnx/taste-skill `soft-skill` + sections 4–8 of `taste-skill`.

packs.label: Wireframe Sketch Recipe Pack
packs.description:
A hand-drawn wireframe exploration — graph-paper background, marker /
pencil tone, multiple tab labels for variants, sticky-note annotations,
scribbled chart placeholders, hatched fills. Reads like a designer's
whiteboard before any pixels are committed. Use when the brief asks for
"wireframe", "sketch wireframe", "hand-drawn", "lo-fi", "whiteboard",
"草稿", or "手绘原型".

packs.label: Pixflow Design Plugins Pack
packs.description: Bundled Pixflow Design scenario routes, atom skills, localized plugin metadata, formal plugin runtime contracts, and plugin design-system fixtures. Recipe examples install separately.

packs.label: Pixflow Bricks Conversion Pack
packs.description: Pixflow Bricks-specific conversion skills, Bricks references, Pixflow Framework rules, and editable JSON guidance.
